refined_caption: The trash bins outside the hospital building are overflowing, with a sign indicating hazardous waste nearby. The bins appear to be full and not properly maintained.
complaint_description: I was appalled to see the trash bins outside the hospital building overflowing with waste. The sign indicating hazardous waste makes it even more concerning, as it poses a risk to patients, visitors, and staff. The hospital should take immediate action to address this issue and ensure a clean environment.
voice_text: The trash cans outside the hospital are overflowing and it's really gross, especially with the hazardous waste sign right there.
